hero.tagline: Ensuring every line of code ships with confidence, quality, and zero compromise.

about.name: DIMAS ASNA
about.bio:
As an Information Systems graduate with a passion for quality, I specialize in designing and executing test strategies that catch what others miss.

From manual testing and exploratory analysis to automated pipelines and CI/CD integration, I thrive on ensuring software is reliable, performant, and production-ready.

description: Documented test results, defect findings, and testing scenarios to support clearer issue tracking and resolution.
Created 50+ manual test cases reducing overlooked defects during regression testing.
Improved regression testing efficiency by creating Selenium IDE test cases.
Collaborated cross-functionally with developers to ensure UI consistency and responsiveness across all internal tools for office and factory teams.

projects.subtitle: A collection of projects I've built, ranging from user interfaces to complex backend systems.
